texto: Humility is the proper attitude towards all true greatness, including one's own greatness as a human being, but above all towards the greatness which is not oneself, which is beyond one's self
explicacao: Citação de Karol Wojtyla sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Humility is the proper attitude towards all true greatness, including one's own greatness as a hu…” articula reflexao, humility, greatness em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
